C1.descriptionTemplate: Ryker obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Obtain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. In this battle, obtain a selected {Chaotic Legacy} Relic, or upgrade an already owned {Chaotic Legacy}.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile and add it to your hand. If it's a critical hit, the selected card's Arithmetica Cost -1.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG 1~6 times, gaining [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. If it deals 6 or more instances of DMG, obtain 1 {Unexpected Gain} with {Exhaust} and an Arithmetica Cost of 0.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies. Randomly draw 1~6 cards; for each card drawn, gain [Power:Arg2] {STR}.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: {All-in!} deals 3 instances DMG and reduces the Arithmetica Cost of drawn Cards by 1.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
Ryker obtains 5 Black Sigils upon killing an enemy. For every 1% Sigil Yield Ryker has, the amount obtained increases by 1%, up to 5 times per exploration.
After obtaining 75/150/300 Black Sigils through battle, relic capacity +1, and at the end of the battle, choose a {Chaotic Legacy} to add to the relic list.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakeners' CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1] %, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Ryker gains +[Arg3]% Crit. Rate and +[Arg4]% Black Sigil Yield. If at least 500 Black Sigils have been obtained through battle, upgrade 1 {Chaotic Legacy} at the start of next battle.

E1.descriptionTemplate: {Unexpected Gain} will also reduce the Arithmetica Cost of the chosen Card by an additional 1 if a critical hit occurs. {Showdown} grants Ryker an additional 3 Aliemus for every critical hit.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Choose 1 card from the Draw Pile and place it into hand. If it's a critical hit, reduce the chosen card's Arithmetica Cost by 2.

Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG 1~6 times, obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus, and for each Critical Hit, gain an additional [Arg3] Aliemus. If 6 or more instances of DMG are dealt, obtain 1 card with an Arithmetica Cost of 0 and an additional {Exhaust} {Unexpected Gain}.

E2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain 15 Black Sigils at the start of the exploration. For every 1% of Sigil Yield attribute Ryker has, the amoun of Black Sigil obtained in this way +1%, and it will also increase the progress of {Winner Takes All}.

E3.descriptionTemplate: For every 1 Black Sigil consumed, increase the Base DMG of {All-in!} by 0.5% for this exploration. Ryker's {Strike} and {Defense} can consume 3 Black Sigils and activate twice when Arithmetica is insufficient.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Ryker obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. If Arithmetica is insufficient, consume 3 Black Sigils to play it twice.
Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Ryker obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. If Arithmetica is insufficient, consume 3 Black Sigils to play it twice.
